title: Add Textylize to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Textylize](https://textylize.vercel.app/) to writing
- Textylize is a mainly client-side text stylizer. It lets users apply text styling changes.

Fixes #11848

gist.headline: Textylize joins the hive
gist.blurb: Textylize just landed in the community directory. It's a neat client-side tool for applying fun text styles to your writing.
gist.summary: Added Textylize, a client-side text styling tool, to the community apps directory under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Textylize in the apps directory to easily format and stylize their text.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) using a retro typewriter or painting letters with a brush, surrounded by floating stylized text characters. Warm, cozy pixel art.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a paintbrush to stylize floating text characters. A retro typewriter sits on a wooden desk nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
